metadata.title: Kanto — Madinaty Neighbor-to-Neighbor Marketplace
metadata.description: Buy and meet your neighbors. A neighbor-to-neighbor marketplace for Madinaty residents.

hero.title: Buy and Meet Your Neighbors
hero.subtitle: A neighbor-to-neighbor marketplace for Madinaty — safe, trusted, simple.

home.trustBanner: ✓ Verified Madinaty residents  ·  Safe meet spots  ·  Token holds
home.aboutNeighborsBody: Every seller and buyer is verified. You know who you're talking to — your neighbor, not a faceless account.
home.aboutBrokerBody: No money moves through the platform. Post, offer, meet. The deal stays between you and your neighbor.
home.aboutWhatsAppBody: Share any listing to WhatsApp with one tap. Communicate the way you already do.

search.noResultsTitle: We couldn't find anything like that
search.noResultsBody: We searched for "{query}" and didn't find any matching listings. If you'd like, we can notify you when something similar gets posted.
search.notifyMe: Notify me when something similar is listed
search.notifySuccess: Done! We'll keep an eye out for you.

offer.tokenHoldHint: Tokens are not money — an internal hold released after handover.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.notFound: We couldn't find what you're looking for.
errors.beFirst: Be the first to list something — your souk is waiting!

footer.partOf: This platform is part of the MadinatyAI ecosystem
footer.copyright: © {year} ZSolutions · New Cairo, Egypt · All rights reserved.
